query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: June spending falls as gas prices dip
articles.description: NEW YORK -- Shoppers slowed their spending in June from May, as they spent less to fill their gas tank because of falling gas prices.

articles.title: Global Market Turmoil: AI-Driven Rally Faces Brutal Selloff
articles.description: A sharp selloff in chipmakers triggered significant losses across global markets, especially in Asia, as investors reassessed the sustainability of the AI-driven rally. This rapid market decline affected indices in Europe and the U.S., with fears of continued losses. Economic trade tensions and rising oil prices further complicated the financial landscape.

articles.title: Is moisture contaminating E20 fuel? Petrol pump owners raise fresh concerns
articles.description: Petrol pump operators say ethanol's tendency to absorb moisture can trigger phase separation in E20 fuel during monsoons and in coastal regions if water enters underground storage tanks.

articles.title: Give consumers option between 100% petrol and ethanol-blended petrol, Aaditya Thackeray writes to PM Modi
articles.description: Aaditya Thackeray urges PM Modi to offer consumers a choice between 100% petrol and ethanol-blended fuel to address concerns.

articles.title: Why has China's oil imports fallen so sharply, and what does it mean for global markets?
articles.description: China's oil imports have fallen sharply. Here's why demand is weakening, how EVs and the economy are reshaping consumption, and what it means for oil prices.

articles.title: Gold Faces Biggest Weekly Loss in 6 Weeks as US-Iran Clashes and Oil Spike Fuel Inflation Fears
articles.description: Gold is on track for its largest weekly loss in six weeks, down 3.4%, as intensifying U.S.-Iran clashes drove oil prices up by 12%. The surge in oil has reignited global inflation worries, strengthening the case for potential Federal Reserve interest rate hikes.

articles.title: Oil Prices Set for Biggest Weekly Surge Since April as Iran War Escalates
articles.description: Oil prices are on track for their biggest weekly gain since April as renewed military conflict around Iran disrupts Middle Eastern oil exports and raises fears of broader shipping disruptions.

articles.title: Oil Prices Rise Nearly 12% This Week As US-Iran Conflict Raises Supply Concerns
articles.description: Oil prices continued their weekly rally on Friday as escalating US-Iran military tensions raised concerns over disruptions to crude shipments from the Gulf and Red Sea regions. Brent and WTI gained nearly 12% this week, with markets closely watching risks around the Strait of Hormuz, a key global energy route

articles.title: Back to square one: Five questions for the ECB
articles.description: The European Central Bank meets again on July 23, with oil prices back at the top of the worry list for policymakers.

articles.title: Indian Stock Indices Surge Amid IT Rally; Oil, Gold Prices Fluctuate
articles.description: Friday saw Indian stock indices rise with Sensex and Nifty opening strong, driven by IT stocks. While oil prices climbed due to US-Iran tensions, gold rebounded despite weekly declines. Experts highlight Nifty's consolidation and geopolitical influences on market sentiment, urging cautious trading amid volatile conditions.
